name: Bhramari

distinctive_features: Emanates bees, hornets, and wasps from her hands
Three eyes representing the sun, moon, and Agni
visual_attributes.size_and_scale: Massive size when in divine form
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: Insects clinging and emanating from her body

domain_specific_visual.ASSOCIATED_INSECTS: Bees, hornets, wasps, flies, termites, mosquitos, spiders

functional_attributes.primary_function: Protector of the deities and slayer of demons

relationships.description: Bhramari is an incarnation of the goddess Mahadevi in Shaktism.
Bhramari defeated the demon Arunasura using her divine form.

contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: Represents divine intervention and protection against evil

contrastive_constraints: NOT a generic bee or insect
NOT a simple humanoid without insect features
